title: Gang & Friends
description: Lightweight Vanilla+ pack: faster, smoother, funnier.
body:
![The Cozy Copper Age Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1ea6d5ac6e0c9608cb2c6b5d7671fbfb90ae8cf_0.webp)
# 🌿 Gang & Friends

**Gang & Friends** keeps the heart of *Minecraft Vanilla* — simple, creative, and free — while adding just enough to make the world feel more alive, immersive, and beautiful.  
It’s the perfect modpack for those who love the classic feel of Minecraft but want a smoother, cozier, and more connected experience with friends.

This pack enhances the **Vanilla experience** with atmosphere and comfort:  
- 🏡 **Stay true to Vanilla** — every mod blends seamlessly with Minecraft’s original charm  
- 🌅 **Explore** improved landscapes, realistic lighting, and detailed biomes  
- 🎵 **Immerse yourself** in nature with ambient sounds and subtle visuals  
- ⚙️ **Enjoy** smoother performance and quality-of-life tweaks  
- 💎 **Play together or solo** — build, trade, and explore at your own pace  

Whether you’re starting a peaceful farm, building a town with friends, or going on late-night mining trips, **Gang & Friends** captures the magic of Vanilla Minecraft — just more alive and inviting.

> ✨ **Join the gang. Keep it Vanilla. Make Minecraft cozy again.**

---

### 🌐 Server Pack
Looking to host your own *Gang & Friends* world?  
Get the official **[Server Pack here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/minecraft-and-friends-servers)** — fully compatible, optimized for Fabric, and even joinable with a Vanilla client!
